text_arabic:
اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيٍْء
وَبِقُوَّتِكَ الَّتِي قَهَرْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيٍْء
وَخَضَعَ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيٍْء
وَذَلَّ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيٍْء
وَبِجَبرُوتِكَ الَّتِي غَلَبْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيٍْء
وَبِعِزَّتِكَ الَّتِي لا يَقُومُ لَهَا شَيْءٌ
وَبِعَظَمَتِكَ الَّتِي مَلأَتْ كُلَّ شَيٍْء
وَبِسُلْطَانِكَ الَّذِي عَلاَ كُلَّ شَيٍْء
وَبِوَجْهِكَ الْبَاقِي بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
وَبِأَسْمَائِكَ الَّتِي مَلأَتْ أَرْكَانَ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
وَبِعِلْمِكَ الَّذِي أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيٍْء
وَبِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذِي أَضَاءَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيٍْء
يَا نُورُ يَا قُدُّوسُ
يَا أَوَّلَ الأَوَّلِينَ
وَيَا آخِرَ الآخِرِينَ
اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَهتِكُ الْعِصَمَ
اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ النِّقَمَ
اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُغيِّرُ النِّعَمَ
اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَحْبِسُ الدُّعَاءَ
اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَقْطَعُ الرََّّجَاءَ
اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ البَلاءَ
اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي كُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ وَكُلَّ خَطِيئَةٍ أَخْطَأْتُهَا
اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِذِكْرِكَ
وَأَسْتَشْفِعُ بِكَ إِلَي نَفْسِكَ
وَأَسْألُكَ بِجُودِكَ أَن تُدْنِيَنِي مِن قُرْبِكَ
وَأَن تُوزِعَنِي شُكْرَكَ
وَأَن تُلْهِمَنِي ذِكْرَكَ
اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ خَاضِعٍ مُّتَذَلِّلٍ خَاشِعٍ أَن تُسَامِحَنِي وَتَرْحَمَنِي
وَتَجْعلَنِي بِقَسَمِكَ رَاضِياً قَانِعاً، وَفِي جَمِيعِ الأَحْوَاِل مُتَوَاضِعاً
اَللَّهُمَّ وَأَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ مَنِ اشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتُهُ
وَأَنزَلَ بِكَ عِنْدَ الشَّدَائِدِ حَاجَتَهُ
وَعَظُمَ فِيمَا عِنْدَكَ رَغْبَتُهُ
اَللَّهُمَّ عَظُمَ سُلْطَانُكَ وَعَلاَ مَكَانُكَ
وَخَفِي مَكْرُكَ وَظَهَرَ أَمْرُكَ
وَغَلَبَ قَهْرُكَ وَجَرَتْ قُدْرَتُكَ
وَلا يُمْكِنُ الْفِرَارُ مِنْ حُكُومَتِكَ
اَللَّهُمَّ لا أَجِدُ لِذُنُوبِي غَافِراً
وَّلا لِقَبَائِحِي سَاتِراً
وَّلا لِشَيٍْء مِّنْ عَمَلِي الْقَبِيحِ بِالْحَسَنِ مُبَدِّلاً غَيْرَكَ
لا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنتَ
سُبْحَانَكَ وَبِحَمْدِكَ
ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي
وَتَجَرَّأْتُ بِجَهْلِي
وَسَكَنتُ إِلَي قَدِيمِ ذِكْرِكَ لِي وَمَنِّكَ عَلَيَّ
اَللَّهُمَّ مَوْلايَ
كَم مِّن قَبِيحٍ سَتَرْتَهُ
وَكَم مِّن فَاِدحٍ مِّنَ البَلاءِ أَقَلْتَهُ
وَكَم مِّنْ عِثَارٍ وَّقَيْتَهُ
وَكَم مِّن مَّكْرُوهٍ دَفَعْتَهُ
وَكَم مِّن ثَنَاٍء جَمِيلٍ لَّسْتُ أَهْلاً لَّهُ نَشَرْتَهُ
اَللَّهُمَّ عَظُمَ بَلائِي
وَأَفْرَطَ بِي سُوءُ حَاِلي
وَقَصُرَتْ بِي أَعْمَاِلي
وَقَعَدَتْ بِي أَغْلاَلِي
وَحَبَسَنِي عَن نَّفْعِي بُعْدُ آمَاِلي
وَخَدَعَتْنِي الدُّنْيَا بِغُرُورِهَا وَنَفْسِي بِجِنَايَتِهَا وَمِطَاِلي
يَا سَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِعِزَّتِكَ أَن لا يَحْجُبَ عَنْكَ دُعَائِي سُوءُ عَمَلِي وَفِعَاِلي
وَلا تَفْضَحَنِي بِخَفِيِّ مَا اطَّلَعْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ سِرِّي
وَلا تُعَاجِلْنِي بِالْعُقُوبَةِ عَلَى مَا عَمِلْتُهُ فِي خَلَوَاتِي
مِنْ سُوءِ فِعْلِي وَإِسَاءَتِي،
وَدَوَامِ تَفْرِيطِي وَجَهَالَتِي
وَكَثْرَةِ شَهَوَاتِي وَغَفْلَتِي
وَكُنِ اَللَّهُمَّ بِعِزَّتِكَ لِي فِي كُلِّ الأَحْوَاِل رَؤُوفاً
وَّعَلَيَّ فِي جَمِيعِ الأُمُورِ عَطُوفاً
إِلَهِي وَرَبِّي مَن لِّي غَيْرُكَ أَسْألُهُ كَشْفَ ضُرِّي وَالْنَّظَرَ فِي أَمْرِي!
إِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي أَجْرَيْتَ عَلَيَّ حُكْماً اتَّبَعْتُ فِيهِ هَوَى نَفْسِي،
وَلَمْ أَحْتَرِسْ فِيهِ مِن تَزْيينِ عَدُوِّي،
فَغَرَّنِي بِمَا أَهْوَى وَأَسْعَدَهُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ القَضَاءُ
فَتَجَاوَزْتُ بِمَا جَرَى عَلَيَّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ بَعْضَ حُدُودِكَ
وَخَالَفْتُ بَعْضَ أَوَامِرِكَ
فَلَكَ الْحُجَّةُ عَلَيَّ فِي جَمِيعِ ذَلِكَ
وَلا حُجَّةَ لِي فِيمَا جَرَي عَلَيَّ فِيهِ قَضَاؤُكَ،
وَأَلْزَمَنِي حُكْمُكَ وَبَلاؤُكَ
وَقَدْ أَتَيْتُكَ يَا إِلَهِي بَعْدَ تَقْصِيرِي وَإِسْرَافِي عَلَى نَفْسِي
مُعْتَذِراً نَّادِماً،
مُّنْكَسِراً مُّسْتَقِيلاً
مُّسْتَغْفِراً مُّنِيباً،
مُّقِرّاً مُّذْعِناً مُّعْتَرِفاً
لا أَجِدُ مَفَرّاً مِّمَّا كَانَ مِنِّي
وَلا مَفْزَعاً أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْهِ في أَمْرِي
غَيْرَ قَبُولِكَ عُذْرِي، وَإِدخَاِلكَ إِيَاي فِي سَعَةٍ مِّن رَّحْمَتِكَ
اَللَّهُمَّ فَاقْبَل عُذْرِي
وَارْحَمْ شِدَّةَ ضُرِّي
وَفُكَّنِي مِن شَدِّ وَثَاقِي
يَا رَبِّ ارْحَمْ ضَعْفَ بَدَنِي وَرِقَّةَ جِلْدِي وَدِقَّةَ عَظْمِي
يَا مَنْ بَدَأَ خَلْقِي وَذِكْرِي وَتَرْبِيَتِي وَبِرِّي وَتَغْذِيَتِي
هَبْنِي لابْتِدَاءِ كَرَمِكَ وَسَاِلفِ بِرِّكَ بِي
يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَرَبِّي
أَتُرَاكَ مُعَذِّبِي بِنَارِكَ بَعْدَ تَوْحِيدِكَ
وَبَعْدَ مَا انْطَوَى عَلَيْهِ قَلْبِي مِن مَّعْرِفَتِكَ
وَلَهِجَ بِهِ لِسَانِي مِنْ ذِكْرِكَ
وَاعْتَقَدَهُ ضَمِيرِي مِنْ حُبِّكَ
وَبَعْدَ صِدْقِ اعْتِرَافِي وَدُعَائِي خَاضِعاً لِّرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ
هَيْهَاتَ أَنتَ أَكْرَمُ مِنْ أَن تُضَيِّعَ مَن رَّبَّيْتَهُ
أَوْ تُبْعِدَ مَنْ أَدْنَيْتَهُ
أَوْ تُشَرِّدَ مَنْ آوَيْتَهُ
أَوْ تُسْلِّمَ إِلىَ الْبلاءِ مَن كَفَيْتَهُ وَرَحِمْتَهُ
وَلَيْتَ شِعْرِي يَا سَيِّدِي وَإِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي
أَتُسَلِّطُ النَّارَ عَلَى وُجُوهٍ خَرَّتْ لِعَظَمَتِكَ سَاجِدَةً
وَّعَلَى أَلْسُنٍ نَّطَقَتْ بِتَوْحِيدِكَ صَادِقَةً وَّبِشُكْرِكَ مَادِحَةً
وَّعَلَى قُلُوبٍ اعْتَرَفَتْ بِإِلَهِيَّتِكَ مُحَقِّقَةً
وَّعَلَى ضَمَائِرَ حَوَتْ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ بِكَ حَتَّى صَارَتْ خَاشِعَةً
وَّعَلَى جَواِرحَ سَعَتْ إِلَى أَوْطَانِ تَعَبُّدِكَ طَائِعَةً وَّأَشَارَتْ بِاسْتِغْفَارِكَ مُذْعِنَةً
مَّا هَكَذَا الظَّنُّ بِكَ وَلا أُخْبِرْنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَنكَ
يَا كَرِيمُ، يَا رَبِّ
وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفِي عَن قَلِيلٍ مِّن بَلاءِ الدُّنْيَا وَعُقُوبَاتِهَا،
وَمَا يَجْرِي فِيهَا مِنَ الْمَكَارِهِ عَلَى أَهْلِهَا
عَلَى أَنَّ ذَلِكَ بَلاءٌ وَّمَكْرُوهٌ، قَلِيلٌ مَّكْثُهُ، يَسِيرٌ بَقَاؤُهُ، قَصِيرٌ مُّدَّتُهُ
فَكَيْفَ احْتِمَاِلي لِبَلاءِ الآخِرَةِ وَجَلِيلِ وُقُوعِ الْمَكَارِهِ فِيهَا!
وَهُوَ بَلاءٌ تَطُولُ مُدَّتُهُ، وَيَدُومُ مَقَامُهُ، وَلا يُخَفَّفُ عَنْ أَهْلِهِ
لأَنَّهُ لا يَكُونُ إِلاَّ عَنْ غَضَبِكَ وَانتِقَامِكَ وَسَخَطِكَ
وَهَذَا مَا لا تَقُومُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالأَرْضُ
يَا سَيِّدِي فَكَيْفَ بِي
وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ الضَّعِيفُ الذَّلِيلُ الْحَقِيرُ الْمِسْكِينُ الْمُسْتَكِينُ
يَا إِلَهِي وَرَبِّي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي
لأَيِّ الأُمُورِ إِلَيْكَ أَشْكُو
وَلِمَا مِنْهَا أَضِجُّ وَأَبْكِي
لأَلِيمِ الْعَذَابِ وَشِدَّتِهِ!
أَمْ لِطُولِ الْبَلاءِ وَمُدَّتِهِ!
فَلَئِن صَيَّرْتَنِي لِلْعُقُوبَاتِ مَعَ أَعْدَائِكَ
وَجَمَعْتَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ أَهْلِ بَلائِكَ
وَفَرَّقْتَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ أَحِبَّائِكَ وَأَوْلِيَائِكَ
فَهَبْنِي يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي وَرَبِّي صَبَرْتُ عَلَى عَذَابِكَ،
فَكَيْفَ أَصْبِرُ عَلَى فِرَاقِكَ
وَهَبْنِي صَبَرْتُ عَلَى حَرِّ نَارِكَ،
فَكَيْفَ أَصْبِرُ عَنِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى كَرَامَتِكَ
أَمْ كَيْفَ أَسْكُنُ فِي النَّارِ وَرَجَائِي عَفْوُكَ
فَبِعِزَّتِكَ يَا سَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي أُقْسِمُ صَادِقاً، لَئِن تَرَكْتَنِي نَاطِقاً
لأَضِجَّنَّ إِلَيْكَ بَيْنَ أَهْلِهَا ضَجِيجَ الآمِلِينَ
وَلأَصْرُخَنَّ إِلَيكَ صُرَاخَ المُسْتَصْرِخِينَ
وَلأَبْكِيَنَّ عَلَيْكَ بُكَاءَ الفَاقِدِينَ
وَلأُنَادِيَنَّكَ أَيْنَ كُنتَ يَا وَلِيَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
يَا غَايَةَ آمَاِل العَارِفِينَ
يَا غِيَاثَ المُسْتَغِيثِينَ
يَا حَبِيبَ قُلُوبِ الصَّادِقِينَ
وَيَا إِلَهَ العَالَمِينَ
أَفَتُرَاكَ، سُبْحَانَكَ يَا إِلَهِي وَبِحَمْدِكَ، تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا صَوْتَ عَبْدٍ مُّسْلِمٍ
سُجِنَ فِيهَا بِمُخَالَفَتِهِ
وَذَاقَ طَعْمَ عَذَابِهَا بِمَعْصِيَتِهِ
وَحُبِسَ بَيْنَ أَطْبَاقِهَا بِجُرْمِهِ وَجَرِيرَتِهِ
وَهُوَ يَضِجُّ إلَيْكَ ضَجِيجَ مُؤَمِّلٍ لِّرَحْمَتِكَ
وَيُنَادِيكَ بِلِسَانِ أَهْلِ تَوْحِيدِكَ
وَيَتَوَسَّلُ إلَيْكَ بِرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ
يَا مَوْلاي فَكَيْفَ يَبقَى فِي الْعَذَابِ وَهُوَ يَرْجُو مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ حِلْمِكَ
أَمْ كَيْفَ تُؤْلِمُهُ النَّارُ وَهُوَ يَامَلُ فَضْلَكَ وَرَحْمَتَكَ
أَمْ كَيْفَ يُحْرِقُهُ لَهِيبُهَا وَأَنتَ تَسْمَعُ صَوْتَهُ وَتَرَى مَكَانَهُ
أَمْ كَيْفَ يَشْتَمِلُ عَلَيْهِ زَفِيرُهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفَهُ
أَمْ كَيْفَ يَتَقَلْقَلُ بَيْنَ أَطْبَاقِهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ صِدْقَهُ
أَمْ كَيْفَ تَزْجُرُهُ زَبَانِيَتُهَا وَهُوَ يُنَادِيكَ يَا رَبَّهُ
أَمْ كَيْفَ يَرْجُو فَضْلَكَ فِي عِتْقِهِ مِنْهَا فَتَتْرُكُهُ فِيهَا
هَيهَاتَ مَا ذَلِكَ الظَّنُّ بِكَ
وَلا الْمَعْرُوفُ مِن فَضْلِكَ
وَلا مُشْبِهٌ لِمَا عَامَلْتَ بِهِ الْمُوَحِّدِينَ مِنْ بِرِّكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ
فَبِالْيَقِينِ أَقْطَعُ لَوْلا مَا حَكَمْتَ بِهِ مِن تَعْذِيبِ جَاحِدِيكَ
وَقَضَيْتَ بِهِ مِنْ إِخْلاَدِ مُعَانِدِيكَ
لَجَعَلْتَ النَّارَ كُلَّهَا بَرْداً وَّسَلاَماً،
وَمَا كَانَ لأَحَدٍ فِيهَا مَقَرّاً وَّلا مُقَاماً
لَّكِنَّكَ تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُكَ أَقْسَمْتَ أَنْ تَمْلأَهَا مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ،
مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ أَجْمَعِينَ
وَأَن تُخَلِّدَ فِيهَا الْمُعَانِدِينَ
وَأَنتَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ قُلْتَ مُبْتَدَئاً، وَّتَطَوَّلْتَ بِالإِنْعَامِ مُتَكَرِّماً:
أَفَمَن كَانَ مُؤْمِنًا كَمَن كَانَ فَاسِقًا ۚ لَّا يَسْتَوُونَ
إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِالْقُدْرَةِ الَّتِي قَدَّرْتَهَا
وَبِالْقَضِيَّةِ الَّتِي حَتَمْتَهَا وَحَكَمْتَهَا وَغَلَبْتَ مَنْ عَلَيْهِ أَجْرَيْتَهَا
أَن تَهَبَ لِي، فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ، وَفِي هَذِهِ السَّاعَةِ
كُلَّ جُرْمٍ أَجْرَمْتُهُ
وَكُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ
وَكُلَّ قَبِيحٍ أَسْرَرْتُهُ
وَكُلَّ جَهْلٍ عَمِلْتُهُ،
كَتَمْتُهُ أَوْ أَعْلَنتُهُ،
أَخفَيْتُهُ أَوْ أَظْهَرْتُهُ
وَكُلَّ سَيِّئَةٍ أَمَرْتَ بِإِثْبَاتِهَا الْكِرَامَ الكَاتِبِينَ
الَّذِينَ وَكَّلْتَهُم بِحِفْظِ مَا يَكُونُ مِنِّي
وَجَعَلْتَهُمْ شُهُوداً عَلَيَّ مَعَ جَوَارِحِي،
وَكُنتَ أَنتَ الرَّقِيبَ عَلَيَّ مِن وَّرَائِهِمْ،
وَالشَّاهِدَ لِمَا خَفِي عَنْهُمْ،
وَبِرَحْمَتِكَ أَخْفَيْتَهُ،
وَبفَضْلِكَ سَتَرْتَهُ
وَأَن تُوَفِّرَ حَظِّي مِن كُلِّ خَيْرٍ تُنْزِلُهُ،
أَوْ إِحْسَانٍ تُفْضِلُهُ
أَوْ بِرٍّ تَنْشِرُهُ،
أَوْ رِزْقٍ تَبْسُطُهُ
أَوْ ذَنْبٍ تَغْفِرُهُ
أَوْ خَطَأٍ تَسْتُرُهُ
يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي وَمَاِلكَ رِقِّي
يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ نَاصِيَتِي
يَا عَلِيماً بِضُرِّي وَمَسْكَنَتِي
يَا خَبِيراً بِفَقْرِي وَفَاقَتِي
يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
أَسْألُكَ بِحَقِّكَ وَقُدْسِكَ
وَأَعْظَمِ صِفَاتِكَ وَأَسْمَائِكَ
أن تَجْعَلَ أَوْقَاتِي فِي اللَّيلِ وَالنَّهَارِ بِذِكْرِكَ مَعْمُورَةً،
وَبِخِدْمَتِكَ مَوْصُولَةً،
وَّأَعْمَاِلي عِنْدَكَ مَقْبُولَةً،
حَتَّى تَكُونَ أَعْمَاِلي وَأَوْرَادِي كُلُّهَا وِرْداً وَّاحِداً،
وَّحَاِلي فِي خِدْمَتِكَ سَرْمَداً
يَا سَيِّدِي، يَا مَنْ عَلَيْهِ مُعَوَّلِي
يَا مَنْ إلَيْهِ شَكَوْتُ أَحْوَاِلي
يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
قَوِّ عَلَى خِدْمَتِكَ جَوَارِحِي
وَاشْدُدْ عَلىَ الْعَزِيمَةِ جَوَانِحِي
وَهَبْ لِي الْجِدَّ فِي خَشْيَتِكَ
وَالدَّوَامَ فِي الإتِّصَاِل بِخِدْمَتِكَ
حَتَّى أَسْرَحَ إِلَيكَ فِي مَيَادِينِ السَّابِقِينَ
وَأُسْرِعَ إلَيْكَ فِي الْمبُادِرِينَ
وَأَشْتَاقَ إلىَ قُرْبِكَ فِي الْمُشْتَاقِينَ
وَأَدْنُوَ مِنْكَ دُنُوَّ الْمُخْلِصِينَ
وَأَخَافَكَ مَخَافَةَ الْمُوقِنِينَ
وَأَجْتَمِعَ فِي جِوَارِكَ مَعَ الْمُؤْمنِينَ
اَللَّهُمَّ وَمَنْ أَرَادَنِي بِسُوٍء فَأَرِدْهُ
وَمَن كَادَنِي فَكِدْهُ
وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَحَسَنِ عَبِيدِكَ نَصِيباً عِنْدَكَ
وَأَقْرَبِهِم مَّنْزِلَةً مِّنْكَ
وَأَخَصِّهِمْ زُلْفَةً لَّديْكَ
فَإِنَّهُ لا يُنَالُ ذَلِكَ إِلاَّ بِفَضْلِكَ
وَجُدْ لِي بِجُودِكَ
وَاعْطِفْ عَلَيَّ بِمَجْدِكَ
وَاحْفَظْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ
وَاجْعَل لِّسَانِي بِذِكْرِكَ لَهِجاً
وَّقَلْبِي بِحُبِّكَ مُتَيَّماً
وَّمُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِحُسْنِ إِجَابَتِكَ
وَأَقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي
وَاغْفِرْ زَلَّتِي
فَإِنَّكَ قَضَيْتَ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ بِعِبَادَتِكَ
وَأَمَرْتَهُم بِدُعَائِكَ
وَضَمِنتَ لَهُمُ الإِجَابَةَ
فَإِلَيْكَ يَا رَبِّ نَصَبْتُ وَجْهِي
وَإلَيْكَ يَا رَبِّ مَدَدتُّ يَدِي
فَبِعِزَّتِكَ اسْتَجِبْ لِي دُعَائِي
وَبَلِّغْنِي مُنَاي
وَلا تَقْطَعْ مِن فَضْلِكَ رَجَائِي
وَاكْفِنِي شَرَّ الْجِنِّ وَالإِنْسِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِي
يَا سَرِيعَ الرِّضَا
اغْفِرْ لِمَن لا يَمْلِكُ إِلاَّ الدُّعَاءَ
فَإِنَّكَ فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا تَشَاءُ
يَا مَنْ اسْمُهُ دَوَاءٌ
وَذِكْرُهُ شِفَاءٌ
وَطَاعَتُهُ غِنًى
ارْحَم مَّن رَّأْسُ مَاِلهِ الرَّجَاءُ
وَسِلاَحُهُ الْبُكَاءُ
يَا سَاِبغَ النِّعَمِ
يَا دَافِعَ النِّقَمِ
يَا نُورَ الْمُسْتَوْحِشِينَ فِي الظُّلَمِ
يَا عَالِماً لا يُعَلَّمُ
صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
وافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنتَ أَهْلُهُ
وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ وَالأَئِمَّةِ الْمَيَامِينَ مِنْ آلِهِ
وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً كَثِيراً
text_english:
O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy, which embraces all things;
And by Your strength, through which You dominatest all things,
And toward which all things are humble
And before which all things are lowly;
And by Your invincibility through which You overwhelmest all things,
And by Your might, which nothing can resist;
And by Your tremendousness, which has filled all things;
by Your force, which towers over all things;
And by Your face, which subsists after the annihilation of all things,
And by Your Names, which have filled the foundations of all things;
And by Your knowledge, which encompasses all things;
And by the light of Your face, through which all things are illumined!
O Light! O All-holy!
O First of those who are first
And O Last of those who are last!
O Allah, forgive me those sins which tear apart safeguards!
O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down adversities!
O Allah, forgive me those sins which alter blessings!
O Allah forgive me those sins which hold back supplication!
O Allah forgive me those sins which cut down the hopes!
O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down tribulation!
O Allah, forgive me every sin I have committed and every mistake I have made!
O Allah, verily I seek nearness to You through remembrance of You,
And I seek intercession from You with Yourself,
And I ask You through Your munificence to bring me near to Your proximity,
And to provide me with gratitude toward You
And to inspire me with Your remembrance.
O Allah, verily I ask You with the asking of a submissive, abased and lowly man to show me forbearance, to have mercy on me
And to make me satisfied and content with Your appointment and [make me] humble in every state.
O Allah, I ask You the question of one whose indigence is extreme,
And who has stated to You in difficulties his need
And whose desire for what is with You has become great.
O Allah, Your force is tremendous, Your place is lofty,
And Your plan is hidden, Your command is manifest,
And Your domination is overwhelming, Your power is unhindered
And escape from Your governance is impossible.
O Allah, I find no forgiver of my sins,
Nor concealer of my ugly acts
Nor transformer of any of my ugly acts into good acts but You
There is no god but You!
Glory be to You, and Thine is the praise!
I have wronged myself,
And I have been audacious in my ignorance
And I have depended upon Your ancient remembrance of me and Your favour toward me.
O Allah! O my Protector!
How many ugly things You hast concealed!
How many burdensome tribulations You hast abolished!
And how many stumbles You hast prevented!
And how many ordeals You hast repelled!
And how much beautiful praise, for which I was unworthy, You hast spread abroad!
O Allah, my tribulation is tremendous,
And my bad state is excessive,
And my acts are inadequate,
And my fetters have tied me down,
And my far-fetched hopes have held me back from my gain
And this world with its delusions, my own soul with its offences and my delay have deceived me.
O my Master! So I ask You by Your might not to let my evil works and acts veil my supplication from You,
And not to disgrace me through the hidden things You knowest of my secrets
And not to hasten me to punishment for what I have done in private:
My evil acts in secrecy and my misdeeds
And my continuous negligence and my ignorance
And my manifold passions and my forgetfulness.
And by Your might, O Allah, be kind to me in all states
And be gracious to me in all affairs!
My God and my Lord! Have I any but You from whom to ask removal of my affliction and regard for my affairs!
My God and my Protector! You put into effect through me a decree in which I followed the caprice of my own soul
And [I] did not remain wary of adorning my enemy.
So he deluded me through my soul's caprice and therein destiny favoured him
So, in what was put into effect through me in that situation, I transgressed some of Your statutes
And disobeyed some of Your commands.
So Thine is the argument against me in all of that
I have no argument in what Your destiny put into effect through me therein
nor in what Your decree and Your tribulation imposed upon me.
Now I have come to You, My God, after my shortcoming and my immoderation toward myself,
Proffering my excuse, regretful,
Broken, apologizing,
Asking forgiveness, repenting,
Acknowledging, submissive, confessing.
I find no place to flee from what occurred through me,
Nor any place of escape to which I may turn in my affairs,
Other than Your acceptance of my excuse and Your entering me into the compass of Your mercy.
O Allah, so accept my excuse,
Have mercy upon the severity of my affliction
And release me from the tightness of my fetters,
My Lord, have mercy upon the weakness of my body, the thinness of my skin and the frailty of my bones.
O You who gave rise to my creation, to the remembrance of me, to the nurture of me, to goodness toward me and to nourishment on me,
Bestow upon me for the sake of Your having given rise [to me] with generosity and Your previous goodness to me!
O Allah, my Master and my Lord!
Canst You see Yourself tormenting me with Your fire after I have professed Your Unity
And after the knowledge of You my heart has embraced,
And the remembrance of You my tongue has constantly mentioned
And the love of You to which my mind has clung,
And after the sincerity of my confession and my supplication, humble before Your lordship?
Far be it from You! You art more generous than that You shouldst squander him whom You hast nurtured,
Or banish him whom You hast brought nigh,
Or drive away him whom You hast given an abode
Or submit to tribulation him whom You hast spared and shown mercy.
Would that I knew, my Master, My God and my Protector,
Whether You wilt give the Fire dominion over faces fallen down prostrate before Your Tremendousness,
And over tongues voicing sincerely the profession of Your Unity and giving thanks to You in praise,
And over hearts acknowledging Your Divinity through verification,
And over minds encompassing knowledge of You until they have become humble
And over bodily members speeding to the places of Your worship in obedience and beckoning for Your forgiveness in submission.
No such opinion is held of You! Nor has such been reported - thanks to Your bounty — concerning You,
O All-generous! My Lord,
And You knowest my weakness before a little of this world's tribulations and punishments,
And before those ordeals which befall its inhabitants,
Even though it is a tribulation and ordeal whose stay is short, whose subsistence is but little and, whose period is but fleeting.
So how can I endure the tribulations of the next world and the great ordeals that occur within it?
For it is a tribulation whose period is long, whose station endures and whose sufferers are given no respite,
Since it only occurs as a result of Your wrath, Your vengeance and Your anger,
And these cannot be withstood by the heavens and the earth.
O Master, so what about me?!
For I am Your weak, lowly, base, wretched and miserable slave.
My God! My Lord! My Master! My Protector!
For which things would I complain to You?
And for which of them would I lament and weep?
For the pain and severity of chastisement?
Or for the length and period of tribulation?
So if You takest me to the punishments with Your enemies,
And gatherest me with the people of Your tribulation
And separatest me from Your friends and saints,
Then suppose, My God, my Master, my Protector and my Lord that I am able to endure Your chastisement,
How can I endure separation from You?
And suppose that I am able to endure the heat of Your fire,
How can I endure not gazing upon Your generosity?
Or how can I dwell in the Fire while my hope is Your pardon?
So by Your might, my Master and my protector, I swear sincerely, if You leavest me with speech,
I will lament to You from the midst of the Fire's inhabitants with lamentation of the hopeful;
I will cry to You with the cry of those crying for help;
I will weep to You with the weeping of the bereft;
And I will call to You, Where art You, O Sponsor of the believers,
O Goal of the hopes of Your knowers,
O Aid of those who seek assistance,
O Friend of the hearts of the sincere
And O God of all the world's inhabitants!
Canst You see Yourself — Glory be to You My God, and Thine is the praised — hearing within the Fire the voice of a slave surrendered to You,
Imprisoned there because of his violations,
Tasting the favour of its torment because of his disobedience,
And confined within its levels because of his sin and crime,
While he laments to You with the lament of one hopeful for Your mercy,
And calls to You with the tongue of those who profess Your Unity
And entreats You by Your lordship!
My Protector, so how should he remain in the chastisement, while he has hope for Your previous clemency?
Or how should the Fire cause him pain while he expects Your bounty and mercy?
Or how should its flames burn him, while You hearest his voice and seest his place?
Or how should its groaning encompass him, while You knowest his weakness?
Or how should he be convulsed among its levels, while You knowest his sincerity?
Or how should its keepers torture him while he calls out to You, O Lord?
Or how should he have hope of Your bounty in freeing him from it, while You abandonest him within it?
Far be it from You! That is not what is expected of You,
Nor what is well-known of Your bounty,
Nor it is similar to the goodness and kindness You hast shown to those who profess Your Unity.
So I declare with certainty that were it not for what You hast decreed concerning the chastisement of Your deniers
And what You hast foreordained concerning the everlasting home of those who stubbornly resist,
You wouldst make the Fire, all of it, coolness and safety,
And no one would have a place of rest or abode within it.
But You—holy are Your Names—hast sworn that You wilt fill it with the unbelievers,
Both Jinn and men together,
And that You wilt place those who stubbornly resist therein forever.
And You— majestic is Your eulogy— said at the beginning and wernt gracious through kindness as a favour,
(What? Is he who has been believer like unto him who has been ungodly? They are not equal)
My God and my Master! So I ask You by the power You hast apportioned
And by the decision which You hast determined and imposed and through which You hast overcome him toward whom it has been put into effect,
That You forgivest me in this night and at this hour
Every offence I have committed,
And every sin I have performed,
And every ugly thing I have concealed
And every folly I have enacted
Whether I have hidden or announced it,
Or I have concealed it or manifested it
And every evil act which You hast commanded the Noble Writers to record,
Those whom You hast appointed to watch over what appears from me
And whom You hast made, along with my bodily members, witness against me.
And You wast Yourself the Watcher over me from behind them,
And the Witness of what is hidden from them
But through Your mercy You concealed it
And through Your bounty You veiled it.
[And I ask You] that You bestowest upon me an abundant share of every good You sendest down,
Or kindness You conferrest,
Or goodness You unfoldest,
Or provision You spreadest out,
Or sin You forgivest,
Or error You coverest.
My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
My God! My Master! My Protector! Owner of my bondage!
O He in whose hand is my forelock!
O He who knows my affliction and my misery!
O He who is aware of my poverty and indigence!
My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
I ask You by Your Truth and Your Holiness
And the greatest of Your Attributes and Names,
That You makest my times in the night and the day inhabited by Your remembrance,
And joined to Your service
And my works acceptable to You,
So that my works and my litanies may all be a single litany
And my occupation with Your service everlasting.
My Master! O He upon whom I depend!
O He to whom I complain about my states!
My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
Strengthen my bodily members in Your service,
And fortify my ribs in determination
And bestow upon me earnestness in my fear of You
And continuity in my being joined to Your service
So that I may move easily toward You in the battlefields of the foremost
And hurry to You among the prominent
And desire fervently Your proximity among the fervently desirous
And move nearer to You with the nearness of the sincere
And fear You with the fear of those who have certitude
And gather with the believers in Your vicinity.
O Allah, whoever desires evil for me, desire [it] for him!
whoever deceives me-deceive him!
And make me one of the most excellent of Your slaves in Portion from You,
And the nearest of them in station to You
And the most elected of them in proximity to You.
For that cannot be attained except by Your bounty.
And grant generously to me through Your munificence,
And incline toward me with Your splendour
And protect me with Your mercy!
And make my tongue remember You without ceasing
And my heart enthralled by Your love!
And be gracious to me by answering me favourably,
And nullify my slips
And forgive my lapses!
For You hast decreed Your worship for Your servants
And commanded them to supplicate You
And assured them that they would be answered.
So toward You, my Lord, I have turned my face
And toward You, my Lord, I have extended my hand.
So by Your might, comply with my supplication
And make me attain my desires!
Do not severe my hoping for Your Favours
And spare me the evil of my enemies from among the jinn and men!
O He, whose pleasure is quickly achieved!
Forgive him who owns nothing but supplication
For You dost what You wilt.
O He whose Name is a remedy,
And whose remembrance is a cure,
And whose obedience is wealth!
Have mercy upon him whose capital is hope
And whose weapon is tears!
O Ample in blessings!
O Repeller of adversities!
O Light of those who are lonely in the darkness!
O Knower who was never taught!
Bless Muhammad and Muhammad's household!
And do with me what is worthy of You!
And Allah bless His messenger and the holy Imams of his household
And give them abundant peace!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيٍْء
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy, which embraces all things;
segments.transliteration: allahumma in-ni as-aluka bi-rah-matikal-lati wasi`at kul-la shay

segments.arabic: وَبِقُوَّتِكَ الَّتِي قَهَرْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيٍْء
segments.translation: And by Your strength, through which You dominatest all things,
segments.transliteration: wa bi-qu-watikal-lati qahar-ta biha kul-la shay

segments.translation: And toward which all things are humble
And before which all things are lowly;

segments.arabic: وَبِجَبرُوتِكَ الَّتِي غَلَبْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ شَيٍْء
segments.translation: And by Your invincibility through which You overwhelmest all things,
segments.transliteration: wa bi-jabarutikal-lati ghalab-ta biha kul-la shay

segments.arabic: وَبِعِزَّتِكَ الَّتِي لا يَقُومُ لَهَا شَيْءٌ
segments.translation: And by Your might, which nothing can resist;
segments.transliteration: wa bi`izzatikal-lati la yaqumu laha shay

segments.translation: And by Your tremendousness, which has filled all things;
by Your force, which towers over all things;

segments.arabic: وَبِوَجْهِكَ الْبَاقِي بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.translation: And by Your face, which subsists after the annihilation of all things,
segments.transliteration: wa bi-waj-hikal-baqi ba`da fana-i kul-li shay

segments.arabic: وَبِأَسْمَائِكَ الَّتِي مَلأَتْ أَرْكَانَ كُلِّ شَيٍْء
segments.translation: And by Your Names, which have filled the foundations of all things;
segments.transliteration: wa bi-as-ma-ikal-lati malat ar-kana kul-li shay

segments.translation: And by Your knowledge, which encompasses all things;

segments.arabic: وَبِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذِي أَضَاءَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيٍْء
segments.translation: And by the light of Your face, through which all things are illumined!
segments.transliteration: wa bi-nuri waj-hikal-ladhi ada-a lahu kul-lu shay

segments.translation: O Light! O All-holy!
O First of those who are first
And O Last of those who are last!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَهتِكُ الْعِصَمَ
segments.translation: O Allah, forgive me those sins which tear apart safeguards!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ النِّقَمَ
segments.translation: O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down adversities!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُغيِّرُ النِّعَمَ
segments.translation: O Allah, forgive me those sins which alter blessings!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَحْبِسُ الدُّعَاءَ
segments.translation: O Allah forgive me those sins which hold back supplication!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَقْطَعُ الرََّّجَاءَ
segments.translation: O Allah forgive me those sins which cut down the hopes!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ البَلاءَ
segments.translation: O Allah, forgive me those sins which draw down tribulation!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي كُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ وَكُلَّ خَطِيئَةٍ أَخْطَأْتُهَا
segments.translation: O Allah, forgive me every sin I have committed and every mistake I have made!
segments.transliteration: allahumma-igh-fir liya kul-la dham-bin adhnabtuhu wa kul-la khati-atin akh-tatuha

segments.translation: O Allah, verily I seek nearness to You through remembrance of You,
And I seek intercession from You with Yourself,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْألُكَ بِجُودِكَ أَن تُدْنِيَنِي مِن قُرْبِكَ
segments.translation: And I ask You through Your munificence to bring me near to Your proximity,
segments.transliteration: wa as-aluka bi-judika an tud-ni-yani min qur-bik

segments.translation: And to provide me with gratitude toward You
And to inspire me with Your remembrance.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ خَاضِعٍ مُّتَذَلِّلٍ خَاشِعٍ أَن تُسَامِحَنِي وَتَرْحَمَنِي
segments.translation: O Allah, verily I ask You with the asking of a submissive, abased and lowly man to show me forbearance, to have mercy on me
segments.transliteration: allahumma in-ni as-luka suala khadii'm-mutadhal-lilin kha-shii'n an tusamihani wa tar-hamani

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعلَنِي بِقَسَمِكَ رَاضِياً قَانِعاً، وَفِي جَمِيعِ الأَحْوَاِل مُتَوَاضِعاً
segments.translation: And to make me satisfied and content with Your appointment and [make me] humble in every state.
segments.transliteration: wa taj-`alani bi-qasamika radiyan qani`n wa fi jamii'l-ah-wali mutawadi`aa

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَأَسْألُكَ سُؤَالَ مَنِ اشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتُهُ
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You the question of one whose indigence is extreme,
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa as-aluka suala manish-tad-dat faqatuh

segments.translation: And who has stated to You in difficulties his need
And whose desire for what is with You has become great.
O Allah, Your force is tremendous, Your place is lofty,
And Your plan is hidden, Your command is manifest,
And Your domination is overwhelming, Your power is unhindered
segments.transliteration: wa ghalaba qah-ruka wa jarat qud-ratuk

segments.translation: And escape from Your governance is impossible.
O Allah, I find no forgiver of my sins,
Nor concealer of my ugly acts

segments.arabic: وَّلا لِشَيٍْء مِّنْ عَمَلِي الْقَبِيحِ بِالْحَسَنِ مُبَدِّلاً غَيْرَكَ
segments.translation: Nor transformer of any of my ugly acts into good acts but You
There is no god but You!
Glory be to You, and Thine is the praise!
I have wronged myself,
And I have been audacious in my ignorance

segments.arabic: وَسَكَنتُ إِلَي قَدِيمِ ذِكْرِكَ لِي وَمَنِّكَ عَلَيَّ
segments.translation: And I have depended upon Your ancient remembrance of me and Your favour toward me.
segments.transliteration: wa sakan-tu ila qadimi dhik-rika li wa man-nika `alay

segments.translation: O Allah! O my Protector!
How many ugly things You hast concealed!

segments.arabic: وَكَم مِّن فَاِدحٍ مِّنَ البَلاءِ أَقَلْتَهُ
segments.translation: How many burdensome tribulations You hast abolished!
And how many stumbles You hast prevented!
And how many ordeals You hast repelled!

segments.arabic: وَكَم مِّن ثَنَاٍء جَمِيلٍ لَّسْتُ أَهْلاً لَّهُ نَشَرْتَهُ
segments.translation: And how much beautiful praise, for which I was unworthy, You hast spread abroad!
segments.transliteration: wa kam-min thana-in jamilil-las-tu ah-lal-lahu nashar-tah

segments.translation: O Allah, my tribulation is tremendous,
And my bad state is excessive,
And my acts are inadequate,
And my fetters have tied me down,
And my far-fetched hopes have held me back from my gain

segments.arabic: وَخَدَعَتْنِي الدُّنْيَا بِغُرُورِهَا وَنَفْسِي بِجِنَايَتِهَا وَمِطَاِلي
segments.translation: And this world with its delusions, my own soul with its offences and my delay have deceived me.
segments.transliteration: wa khada`at-nid-dunya bi-ghururi-ha wa naf-si bi-jinayatiha wa mita-li

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِعِزَّتِكَ أَن لا يَحْجُبَ عَنْكَ دُعَائِي سُوءُ عَمَلِي وَفِعَاِلي
segments.translation: O my Master! So I ask You by Your might not to let my evil works and acts veil my supplication from You,
segments.transliteration: ya say-yidi fa-as-aluka bi-i'z-zatika an la yah-juba `an-ka du`aa-i suo-u `amali wa fi`ali

segments.arabic: وَلا تَفْضَحَنِي بِخَفِيِّ مَا اطَّلَعْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ سِرِّي
segments.translation: And not to disgrace me through the hidden things You knowest of my secrets
segments.transliteration: wa-la taf-dah-ni bi-khafi-yi mat-tala`ta `ailayhi min sir-ri

segments.arabic: وَلا تُعَاجِلْنِي بِالْعُقُوبَةِ عَلَى مَا عَمِلْتُهُ فِي خَلَوَاتِي
segments.translation: And not to hasten me to punishment for what I have done in private:
segments.transliteration: wa-la tu`ajil-ni bil-u'qubati `ala ma `amil-tuhu fi khalawati

segments.translation: My evil acts in secrecy and my misdeeds
And my continuous negligence and my ignorance
And my manifold passions and my forgetfulness.

segments.arabic: وَكُنِ اَللَّهُمَّ بِعِزَّتِكَ لِي فِي كُلِّ الأَحْوَاِل رَؤُوفاً
segments.translation: And by Your might, O Allah, be kind to me in all states
segments.transliteration: wa kunil-lahumma bi-i'z-zatika li fi kul-lil-ah-wali ra’ufa

segments.translation: And be gracious to me in all affairs!

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي وَرَبِّي مَن لِّي غَيْرُكَ أَسْألُهُ كَشْفَ ضُرِّي وَالْنَّظَرَ فِي أَمْرِي!
segments.translation: My God and my Lord! Have I any but You from whom to ask removal of my affliction and regard for my affairs!
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa rab-bi mal-li ghayruka as-aluhu kash-fa dur-ri wan-nazara fi am-ri!

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي أَجْرَيْتَ عَلَيَّ حُكْماً اتَّبَعْتُ فِيهِ هَوَى نَفْسِي،
segments.translation: My God and my Protector! You put into effect through me a decree in which I followed the caprice of my own soul
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa maw-laya aj-rayta `alay-ya huk-mant-taba`tu fihi hawa naf-si

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ أَحْتَرِسْ فِيهِ مِن تَزْيينِ عَدُوِّي،
segments.translation: And [I] did not remain wary of adorning my enemy.
segments.transliteration: wa lam ah-taris fihi min tazyini `adu-wi

segments.arabic: فَغَرَّنِي بِمَا أَهْوَى وَأَسْعَدَهُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ القَضَاءُ
segments.translation: So he deluded me through my soul's caprice and therein destiny favoured him
segments.transliteration: fa-ghar-rani bi-ma ah-wa wa as-`adahu `ala dha-likal-qada

segments.arabic: فَتَجَاوَزْتُ بِمَا جَرَى عَلَيَّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ بَعْضَ حُدُودِكَ
segments.translation: So, in what was put into effect through me in that situation, I transgressed some of Your statutes
segments.transliteration: fa-taja-waztu bi-ma jara `alay-ya min dha-lika ba`da hududik

segments.translation: And disobeyed some of Your commands.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحُجَّةُ عَلَيَّ فِي جَمِيعِ ذَلِكَ
segments.translation: So Thine is the argument against me in all of that

segments.arabic: وَلا حُجَّةَ لِي فِيمَا جَرَي عَلَيَّ فِيهِ قَضَاؤُكَ،
segments.translation: I have no argument in what Your destiny put into effect through me therein
segments.transliteration: wa-la huj-jata li fima jara `alay-ya fihi qadauka

segments.translation: nor in what Your decree and Your tribulation imposed upon me.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ أَتَيْتُكَ يَا إِلَهِي بَعْدَ تَقْصِيرِي وَإِسْرَافِي عَلَى نَفْسِي
segments.translation: Now I have come to You, My God, after my shortcoming and my immoderation toward myself,
segments.transliteration: wa qad ataytuka ya ilahi ba`da taq-siri wa is-rafi `ala naf-si

segments.translation: Proffering my excuse, regretful,
Broken, apologizing,
Asking forgiveness, repenting,
Acknowledging, submissive, confessing.

segments.arabic: لا أَجِدُ مَفَرّاً مِّمَّا كَانَ مِنِّي
segments.translation: I find no place to flee from what occurred through me,

segments.arabic: وَلا مَفْزَعاً أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْهِ في أَمْرِي
segments.translation: Nor any place of escape to which I may turn in my affairs,
segments.transliteration: wa-la mafza'an atawaj-jahu ilayhi fi am-ri

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ قَبُولِكَ عُذْرِي، وَإِدخَاِلكَ إِيَاي فِي سَعَةٍ مِّن رَّحْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: Other than Your acceptance of my excuse and Your entering me into the compass of Your mercy.
segments.transliteration: ghayra qabulika u'dhri wa id-khalika i-yaya fi sa'tim-mir-rah-matik

segments.translation: O Allah, so accept my excuse,
Have mercy upon the severity of my affliction
And release me from the tightness of my fetters,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ ارْحَمْ ضَعْفَ بَدَنِي وَرِقَّةَ جِلْدِي وَدِقَّةَ عَظْمِي
segments.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon the weakness of my body, the thinness of my skin and the frailty of my bones.
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bir-ham da`fa badani wa riq-qata jil-di wa diq-qata `azmi

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بَدَأَ خَلْقِي وَذِكْرِي وَتَرْبِيَتِي وَبِرِّي وَتَغْذِيَتِي
segments.translation: O You who gave rise to my creation, to the remembrance of me, to the nurture of me, to goodness toward me and to nourishment on me,
segments.transliteration: ya mam bada khal-qi wa dhik-ri wa tar-bi-yati wa biri wa tagh-dhi-yati

segments.arabic: هَبْنِي لابْتِدَاءِ كَرَمِكَ وَسَاِلفِ بِرِّكَ بِي
segments.translation: Bestow upon me for the sake of Your having given rise [to me] with generosity and Your previous goodness to me!
segments.transliteration: hab-ni lb-tida-i karamika wa salifi bir-rika bi

segments.translation: O Allah, my Master and my Lord!
segments.transliteration: ya ilahi wa say-yidi wa rab-bi

segments.translation: Canst You see Yourself tormenting me with Your fire after I have professed Your Unity

segments.arabic: وَبَعْدَ مَا انْطَوَى عَلَيْهِ قَلْبِي مِن مَّعْرِفَتِكَ
segments.translation: And after the knowledge of You my heart has embraced,
And the remembrance of You my tongue has constantly mentioned
segments.transliteration: wa lahija bihi lisani min dhik-rik

segments.translation: And the love of You to which my mind has clung,

segments.arabic: وَبَعْدَ صِدْقِ اعْتِرَافِي وَدُعَائِي خَاضِعاً لِّرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ
segments.translation: And after the sincerity of my confession and my supplication, humble before Your lordship?
segments.transliteration: wa ba`da sid-qi-`a-tirafi wa du`aa-i khadi`aal-li-rububi-yatika

segments.arabic: هَيْهَاتَ أَنتَ أَكْرَمُ مِنْ أَن تُضَيِّعَ مَن رَّبَّيْتَهُ
segments.translation: Far be it from You! You art more generous than that You shouldst squander him whom You hast nurtured,
segments.transliteration: hayhata anta ak-ramu min an tuday-yi`a mar-rab-baytah

segments.translation: Or banish him whom You hast brought nigh,
Or drive away him whom You hast given an abode

segments.arabic: أَوْ تُسْلِّمَ إِلىَ الْبلاءِ مَن كَفَيْتَهُ وَرَحِمْتَهُ
segments.translation: Or submit to tribulation him whom You hast spared and shown mercy.
segments.transliteration: aw tus-s-lima ilal-bala-i man kafay-tahu wa rahim-tah

segments.arabic: وَلَيْتَ شِعْرِي يَا سَيِّدِي وَإِلَهِي وَمَوْلاي
segments.translation: Would that I knew, my Master, My God and my Protector,
segments.transliteration: wa layta shi`a-ri yay say-yidi wa ilahi wa maw-lay

segments.arabic: أَتُسَلِّطُ النَّارَ عَلَى وُجُوهٍ خَرَّتْ لِعَظَمَتِكَ سَاجِدَةً
segments.translation: Whether You wilt give the Fire dominion over faces fallen down prostrate before Your Tremendousness,

segments.arabic: وَّعَلَى أَلْسُنٍ نَّطَقَتْ بِتَوْحِيدِكَ صَادِقَةً وَّبِشُكْرِكَ مَادِحَةً
segments.translation: And over tongues voicing sincerely the profession of Your Unity and giving thanks to You in praise,
segments.transliteration: wa `ala al-sunin-nataqat bi-taw-hidika sadiqataw-wa bishuk-rika madihah

segments.translation: And over hearts acknowledging Your Divinity through verification,

segments.arabic: وَّعَلَى ضَمَائِرَ حَوَتْ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ بِكَ حَتَّى صَارَتْ خَاشِعَةً
segments.translation: And over minds encompassing knowledge of You until they have become humble
segments.transliteration: wa `ala dama-ira hawat minal-i'l-mi bika hat-ta sarat khashi`ah

segments.arabic: وَّعَلَى جَواِرحَ سَعَتْ إِلَى أَوْطَانِ تَعَبُّدِكَ طَائِعَةً وَّأَشَارَتْ بِاسْتِغْفَارِكَ مُذْعِنَةً
segments.translation: And over bodily members speeding to the places of Your worship in obedience and beckoning for Your forgiveness in submission.
segments.transliteration: wa `ala jawariha sa't ila aw-tani ta'b-budika ta-i`ataw-wa asharat bis-tigh-farika mudhi'nah

segments.arabic: مَّا هَكَذَا الظَّنُّ بِكَ وَلا أُخْبِرْنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَنكَ
segments.translation: No such opinion is held of You! Nor has such been reported - thanks to Your bounty — concerning You,
segments.transliteration: ma hkadhaz-zan-nu bika wa-la ukh-bir-na bi-fadlika `anka

segments.translation: O All-generous! My Lord,

segments.arabic: وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفِي عَن قَلِيلٍ مِّن بَلاءِ الدُّنْيَا وَعُقُوبَاتِهَا،
segments.translation: And You knowest my weakness before a little of this world's tribulations and punishments,
segments.transliteration: wa anta ta`lamu da`fi `an qalilim-min bala-id-dun-ya wa u'qubatiha

segments.arabic: وَمَا يَجْرِي فِيهَا مِنَ الْمَكَارِهِ عَلَى أَهْلِهَا
segments.translation: And before those ordeals which befall its inhabitants,
segments.transliteration: wa ma yaj-ri fiha minal-makarihi `ala ah-liha

segments.arabic: عَلَى أَنَّ ذَلِكَ بَلاءٌ وَّمَكْرُوهٌ، قَلِيلٌ مَّكْثُهُ، يَسِيرٌ بَقَاؤُهُ، قَصِيرٌ مُّدَّتُهُ
segments.translation: Even though it is a tribulation and ordeal whose stay is short, whose subsistence is but little and, whose period is but fleeting.
segments.transliteration: `ala an-na dha-lika bala-uw-wa mak-ruhun, qalilum-mak-thuhu, yasirum baqa-uhu, qasirum-mud-datuh

segments.arabic: فَكَيْفَ احْتِمَاِلي لِبَلاءِ الآخِرَةِ وَجَلِيلِ وُقُوعِ الْمَكَارِهِ فِيهَا!
segments.translation: So how can I endure the tribulations of the next world and the great ordeals that occur within it?
segments.transliteration: fa-kayfah-timali li-bala-il-akhirati wa jalili wuqui'l-makarihi fiha!

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ بَلاءٌ تَطُولُ مُدَّتُهُ، وَيَدُومُ مَقَامُهُ، وَلا يُخَفَّفُ عَنْ أَهْلِهِ
segments.translation: For it is a tribulation whose period is long, whose station endures and whose sufferers are given no respite,
segments.transliteration: wa huwa bala-un tatulu mud-datuhu, wa yadumu maqamuhu, wa-la yukhaf-fafu `an ah-lih

segments.arabic: لأَنَّهُ لا يَكُونُ إِلاَّ عَنْ غَضَبِكَ وَانتِقَامِكَ وَسَخَطِكَ
segments.translation: Since it only occurs as a result of Your wrath, Your vengeance and Your anger,
segments.transliteration: li-an-nahu la yakunu il-la `an ghadabika wan-tiqamika wa sakhatik

segments.arabic: وَهَذَا مَا لا تَقُومُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالأَرْضُ
segments.translation: And these cannot be withstood by the heavens and the earth.
segments.transliteration: wa hadha ma la taqumu lahus-samawatu wal-ardu

segments.translation: O Master, so what about me?!

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ الضَّعِيفُ الذَّلِيلُ الْحَقِيرُ الْمِسْكِينُ الْمُسْتَكِينُ
segments.translation: For I am Your weak, lowly, base, wretched and miserable slave.
My God! My Lord! My Master! My Protector!
segments.transliteration: ya ilahi wa rab-bi wa say-yidi wa maw-lay

segments.translation: For which things would I complain to You?
And for which of them would I lament and weep?
segments.transliteration: wa lima minha adij-ju wa ab-ki

segments.translation: For the pain and severity of chastisement?
Or for the length and period of tribulation?
So if You takest me to the punishments with Your enemies,
And gatherest me with the people of Your tribulation
segments.transliteration: wa jama`ta bayni wa bayna ahli bala-ik

segments.translation: And separatest me from Your friends and saints,
segments.transliteration: wa far-raq-ta bay-ni wa bay-na ahib-ba-ika wa aw-li-ya-ik

segments.arabic: فَهَبْنِي يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي وَرَبِّي صَبَرْتُ عَلَى عَذَابِكَ،
segments.translation: Then suppose, My God, my Master, my Protector and my Lord that I am able to endure Your chastisement,
segments.transliteration: fa-hab-ni ya ilahi wasay-yidi wa mawlaya wa rab-bi sabar-tu `ala `adhabika

segments.translation: How can I endure separation from You?
And suppose that I am able to endure the heat of Your fire,

segments.arabic: فَكَيْفَ أَصْبِرُ عَنِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى كَرَامَتِكَ
segments.translation: How can I endure not gazing upon Your generosity?

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ أَسْكُنُ فِي النَّارِ وَرَجَائِي عَفْوُكَ
segments.translation: Or how can I dwell in the Fire while my hope is Your pardon?
segments.transliteration: am kayfa as-kunu fin-nari wa raja-i `af-wuk

segments.arabic: فَبِعِزَّتِكَ يَا سَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي أُقْسِمُ صَادِقاً، لَئِن تَرَكْتَنِي نَاطِقاً
segments.translation: So by Your might, my Master and my protector, I swear sincerely, if You leavest me with speech,
segments.transliteration: fabi-i'z-zatika ya say-yidi wa mawlaya uq-simu sadiqal-la-in tarak-tani natiqan

segments.arabic: لأَضِجَّنَّ إِلَيْكَ بَيْنَ أَهْلِهَا ضَجِيجَ الآمِلِينَ
segments.translation: I will lament to You from the midst of the Fire's inhabitants with lamentation of the hopeful;
I will cry to You with the cry of those crying for help;
I will weep to You with the weeping of the bereft;

segments.arabic: وَلأُنَادِيَنَّكَ أَيْنَ كُنتَ يَا وَلِيَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: And I will call to You, Where art You, O Sponsor of the believers,
segments.transliteration: wa la-unadi-yan-naka ay-na kun-ta ya wali-yal-mu-minin

segments.translation: O Goal of the hopes of Your knowers,
O Aid of those who seek assistance,
O Friend of the hearts of the sincere
And O God of all the world's inhabitants!

segments.arabic: أَفَتُرَاكَ، سُبْحَانَكَ يَا إِلَهِي وَبِحَمْدِكَ، تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا صَوْتَ عَبْدٍ مُّسْلِمٍ
segments.translation: Canst You see Yourself — Glory be to You My God, and Thine is the praised — hearing within the Fire the voice of a slave surrendered to You,
segments.transliteration: afaturaka sub-hanaka ya ilahi wa biham-dika tas-mau' fiha saw-ta `ab-dim-mus-limin

segments.translation: Imprisoned there because of his violations,
Tasting the favour of its torment because of his disobedience,
And confined within its levels because of his sin and crime,
segments.transliteration: wa hubisa bayna at-baqiha bijur-mih wa jariratih

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ يَضِجُّ إلَيْكَ ضَجِيجَ مُؤَمِّلٍ لِّرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: While he laments to You with the lament of one hopeful for Your mercy,
segments.transliteration: wa huwa yadij-ju ilayka dajija muammilil-lirah-mat-k

segments.translation: And calls to You with the tongue of those who profess Your Unity
And entreats You by Your lordship!

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاي فَكَيْفَ يَبقَى فِي الْعَذَابِ وَهُوَ يَرْجُو مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ حِلْمِكَ
segments.translation: My Protector, so how should he remain in the chastisement, while he has hope for Your previous clemency?
segments.transliteration: ya mawlay fa-kayfa yabqa fil-`adhabi wa huwa yar-ju ma salafa min hil-mik

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ تُؤْلِمُهُ النَّارُ وَهُوَ يَامَلُ فَضْلَكَ وَرَحْمَتَكَ
segments.translation: Or how should the Fire cause him pain while he expects Your bounty and mercy?
segments.transliteration: am kayfa tu-limuhun-naru wa huwa ya-malu fadlaka wa rah-mataka

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يُحْرِقُهُ لَهِيبُهَا وَأَنتَ تَسْمَعُ صَوْتَهُ وَتَرَى مَكَانَهُ
segments.translation: Or how should its flames burn him, while You hearest his voice and seest his place?
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yuh-riquhu lahibuha wa anta tas-mau' saw-tahu wa tara makanah

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَشْتَمِلُ عَلَيْهِ زَفِيرُهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ ضَعْفَهُ
segments.translation: Or how should its groaning encompass him, while You knowest his weakness?
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yash-tamilu `ailayhi zafiruha wa anta ta`lamu da`fah

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَتَقَلْقَلُ بَيْنَ أَطْبَاقِهَا وَأَنتَ تَعْلَمُ صِدْقَهُ
segments.translation: Or how should he be convulsed among its levels, while You knowest his sincerity?
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yataqalqalu bayna at-baqiha wa anta ta`lamu sid-qah

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ تَزْجُرُهُ زَبَانِيَتُهَا وَهُوَ يُنَادِيكَ يَا رَبَّهُ
segments.translation: Or how should its keepers torture him while he calls out to You, O Lord?
segments.transliteration: am kayfa tazjuruhu zabani-yatuha wa huwa yunadika ya rab-bah

segments.arabic: أَمْ كَيْفَ يَرْجُو فَضْلَكَ فِي عِتْقِهِ مِنْهَا فَتَتْرُكُهُ فِيهَا
segments.translation: Or how should he have hope of Your bounty in freeing him from it, while You abandonest him within it?
segments.transliteration: am kayfa yar-ju fadlaka fi i't-qihi minha fatat-rukuhu fiha

segments.translation: Far be it from You! That is not what is expected of You,
Nor what is well-known of Your bounty,

segments.arabic: وَلا مُشْبِهٌ لِمَا عَامَلْتَ بِهِ الْمُوَحِّدِينَ مِنْ بِرِّكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ
segments.translation: Nor it is similar to the goodness and kindness You hast shown to those who profess Your Unity.
segments.transliteration: wa-la mush-biha lima `amal-ta bihil-muah-hidina mim bir-rika wa ih-sanik

segments.arabic: فَبِالْيَقِينِ أَقْطَعُ لَوْلا مَا حَكَمْتَ بِهِ مِن تَعْذِيبِ جَاحِدِيكَ
segments.translation: So I declare with certainty that were it not for what You hast decreed concerning the chastisement of Your deniers
segments.transliteration: fa-bial-yaqini aq-tau' law-la ma hakam-ta bihi min ta`dhibi jahidik

segments.translation: And what You hast foreordained concerning the everlasting home of those who stubbornly resist,
segments.transliteration: wa qadayta bihi min ikh-laydi mu`anidik

segments.translation: You wouldst make the Fire, all of it, coolness and safety,

segments.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لأَحَدٍ فِيهَا مَقَرّاً وَّلا مُقَاماً
segments.translation: And no one would have a place of rest or abode within it.
segments.transliteration: wa ma kana li-ahadin fiha maqar-raw-wa-la muqama

segments.arabic: لَّكِنَّكَ تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُكَ أَقْسَمْتَ أَنْ تَمْلأَهَا مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ،
segments.translation: But You—holy are Your Names—hast sworn that You wilt fill it with the unbelievers,
segments.transliteration: lakin-naka taqad-dasat as-ma-uka aq-sam-ta an tam-laha minal-kafirina;

segments.translation: Both Jinn and men together,
And that You wilt place those who stubbornly resist therein forever.

segments.arabic: وَأَنتَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ قُلْتَ مُبْتَدَئاً، وَّتَطَوَّلْتَ بِالإِنْعَامِ مُتَكَرِّماً:
segments.translation: And You— majestic is Your eulogy— said at the beginning and wernt gracious through kindness as a favour,
segments.transliteration: wa anta jal-la thana-uka qul-ta mub-tadiwaw-wa tataw-wal-ta bil-in-`ami mutakar-rima

segments.arabic: أَفَمَن كَانَ مُؤْمِنًا كَمَن كَانَ فَاسِقًا ۚ لَّا يَسْتَوُونَ
segments.translation: (What? Is he who has been believer like unto him who has been ungodly? They are not equal)
segments.transliteration: afaman kana muminan kaman kana fasiqal-la yas-tawun

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي فَأَسْألُكَ بِالْقُدْرَةِ الَّتِي قَدَّرْتَهَا
segments.translation: My God and my Master! So I ask You by the power You hast apportioned
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa say-yidi fa-as-aluka bial-qud-ratil-lati qad-dartaha

segments.arabic: وَبِالْقَضِيَّةِ الَّتِي حَتَمْتَهَا وَحَكَمْتَهَا وَغَلَبْتَ مَنْ عَلَيْهِ أَجْرَيْتَهَا
segments.translation: And by the decision which You hast determined and imposed and through which You hast overcome him toward whom it has been put into effect,
segments.transliteration: wa bil-qadi-yatil-lati hatam-taha wa hakam-taha wa ghalab-ta man `ailayhi aj-raytaha

segments.arabic: أَن تَهَبَ لِي، فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ، وَفِي هَذِهِ السَّاعَةِ
segments.translation: That You forgivest me in this night and at this hour
segments.transliteration: an tahaba li fi hadhihil-laylati wa fi hadhihis-sa'ah

segments.translation: Every offence I have committed,
And every sin I have performed,
And every ugly thing I have concealed
And every folly I have enacted
Whether I have hidden or announced it,
Or I have concealed it or manifested it

segments.arabic: وَكُلَّ سَيِّئَةٍ أَمَرْتَ بِإِثْبَاتِهَا الْكِرَامَ الكَاتِبِينَ
segments.translation: And every evil act which You hast commanded the Noble Writers to record,

segments.arabic: الَّذِينَ وَكَّلْتَهُم بِحِفْظِ مَا يَكُونُ مِنِّي
segments.translation: Those whom You hast appointed to watch over what appears from me
segments.transliteration: al-ladhina wak-kal-tahum bi-hif-zi ma yakunu min-ni

segments.translation: And whom You hast made, along with my bodily members, witness against me.

segments.arabic: وَكُنتَ أَنتَ الرَّقِيبَ عَلَيَّ مِن وَّرَائِهِمْ،
segments.translation: And You wast Yourself the Watcher over me from behind them,
And the Witness of what is hidden from them
But through Your mercy You concealed it
And through Your bounty You veiled it.

segments.arabic: وَأَن تُوَفِّرَ حَظِّي مِن كُلِّ خَيْرٍ تُنْزِلُهُ،
segments.translation: [And I ask You] that You bestowest upon me an abundant share of every good You sendest down,
segments.transliteration: wa an tuwf-fira haz-zi min kul-li khayrin tunziluh

segments.translation: Or kindness You conferrest,
Or goodness You unfoldest,
Or provision You spreadest out,
Or sin You forgivest,
Or error You coverest.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
segments.translation: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bi ya rab-bi ya rabb

segments.arabic: يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي وَمَوْلاي وَمَاِلكَ رِقِّي
segments.translation: My God! My Master! My Protector! Owner of my bondage!
segments.transliteration: ya ilahi wa say-yidi wa maw-laya wa malika riq-qi

segments.translation: O He in whose hand is my forelock!
O He who knows my affliction and my misery!
O He who is aware of my poverty and indigence!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
segments.translation: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bi ya ya rab-bi ya rabb

segments.translation: I ask You by Your Truth and Your Holiness
And the greatest of Your Attributes and Names,

segments.arabic: أن تَجْعَلَ أَوْقَاتِي فِي اللَّيلِ وَالنَّهَارِ بِذِكْرِكَ مَعْمُورَةً،
segments.translation: That You makest my times in the night and the day inhabited by Your remembrance,
segments.transliteration: an taj-`ala aw-qati fil-layli wan-nahari bi-dhik-rika ma`murah

segments.translation: And joined to Your service
And my works acceptable to You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى تَكُونَ أَعْمَاِلي وَأَوْرَادِي كُلُّهَا وِرْداً وَّاحِداً،
segments.translation: So that my works and my litanies may all be a single litany
segments.transliteration: hat-ta takuna a`mali wa aw-radi kul-luha wir-daw-wahidan

segments.translation: And my occupation with Your service everlasting.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي، يَا مَنْ عَلَيْهِ مُعَوَّلِي
segments.translation: My Master! O He upon whom I depend!
O He to whom I complain about my states!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ
segments.translation: My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
segments.transliteration: ya rab-bi ya rab-bi ya rabb

segments.translation: Strengthen my bodily members in Your service,
And fortify my ribs in determination
And bestow upon me earnestness in my fear of You
And continuity in my being joined to Your service

segments.arabic: حَتَّى أَسْرَحَ إِلَيكَ فِي مَيَادِينِ السَّابِقِينَ
segments.translation: So that I may move easily toward You in the battlefields of the foremost
And hurry to You among the prominent
And desire fervently Your proximity among the fervently desirous
And move nearer to You with the nearness of the sincere
And fear You with the fear of those who have certitude
And gather with the believers in Your vicinity.
O Allah, whoever desires evil for me, desire [it] for him!
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa man aradani bisuo-in farid-hu

segments.translation: whoever deceives me-deceive him!

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَحَسَنِ عَبِيدِكَ نَصِيباً عِنْدَكَ
segments.translation: And make me one of the most excellent of Your slaves in Portion from You,
And the nearest of them in station to You
And the most elected of them in proximity to You.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لا يُنَالُ ذَلِكَ إِلاَّ بِفَضْلِكَ
segments.translation: For that cannot be attained except by Your bounty.
segments.transliteration: fa-in-nahu la yunalu dha-lika il-la bi-fadlik

segments.translation: And grant generously to me through Your munificence,
And incline toward me with Your splendour
And protect me with Your mercy!
And make my tongue remember You without ceasing
And my heart enthralled by Your love!
And be gracious to me by answering me favourably,
And nullify my slips
And forgive my lapses!
For You hast decreed Your worship for Your servants
And commanded them to supplicate You
And assured them that they would be answered.
So toward You, my Lord, I have turned my face
And toward You, my Lord, I have extended my hand.
segments.transliteration: wa ilayka ya rab-bi madad-tu yadi

segments.translation: So by Your might, comply with my supplication
And make me attain my desires!
Do not severe my hoping for Your Favours

segments.arabic: وَاكْفِنِي شَرَّ الْجِنِّ وَالإِنْسِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِي
segments.translation: And spare me the evil of my enemies from among the jinn and men!
O He, whose pleasure is quickly achieved!

segments.arabic: اغْفِرْ لِمَن لا يَمْلِكُ إِلاَّ الدُّعَاءَ
segments.translation: Forgive him who owns nothing but supplication
For You dost what You wilt.
O He whose Name is a remedy,
And whose remembrance is a cure,
And whose obedience is wealth!
Have mercy upon him whose capital is hope
And whose weapon is tears!
O Ample in blessings!
O Repeller of adversities!
O Light of those who are lonely in the darkness!
O Knower who was never taught!
Bless Muhammad and Muhammad's household!
And do with me what is worthy of You!

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ وَالأَئِمَّةِ الْمَيَامِينَ مِنْ آلِهِ
segments.translation: And Allah bless His messenger and the holy Imams of his household
segments.transliteration: wa sal-lallahu `ala rasulihi wal-aimmatil-mayamina min a-lihi

segments.translation: And give them abundant peace!
